ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "text" TEXT /* The text of the sentence */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the sentence (e.g., book, article, transcript) */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language of the sentence */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the sentence was added to the system */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* The user who annotated the sentence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event" TEXT /* The verb representing the event */,
  "supersense_category" TEXT /* Category of the verb (e.g., communication, motion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the event */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the event identification */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coreferences" (
  "coref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coreference entry */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentence ID where the coreference occurs */,
  "coref_type" TEXT /* Type of coreference (subject, object) */,
  "text" TEXT /* The text of the coreference */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* The type of entity (e.g., person, organization) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the coreference identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coref_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentence_events" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentence ID */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event ID */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* The starting index of the event in the sentence */,
  "end_index" INTEGER /* The ending index of the event in the sentence */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the event in the sentence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_coreferences" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event ID */,
  "coref_id_subj" INTEGER /* Coreference ID for the subject */,
  "coref_id_dobj" INTEGER /* Coreference ID for the object */,
  "confidence_score_subj" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the subject coreference */,
  "confidence_score_dobj" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the object coreference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_coreferences_coref_id_dobj FOREIGN KEY ("coref_id_dobj") REFERENCES coreferences ("coref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_coreferences_coref_id_subj FOREIGN KEY ("coref_id_subj") REFERENCES coreferences ("coref_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_events" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who interacted with the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event ID */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (view, edit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments the user made during the interaction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the user's confidence in their interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis performed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the analysis (draft, completed) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the analysis was last modified */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
